text: Being in this space, I feel a sense of curiosity and stimulation. The glass walls and futuristic displays evoke a place where ideas are made visible—the boundary between inside and outside blurs, as if thought itself were on display. Here, surrounded by words like 'research' and 'innovation,' I become quietly aware of the restless human urge to understand, develop, and connect. My presence feels purposeful, yet I am also a spectator, pondering the ever-unfolding story of knowledge becoming form.
